courses.title: My Courses
courses.empty: No courses found. Create the first one!
courses.name: Course name
courses.formula_help_title: How to use the calculation formula
courses.formula_help_body: Use identifiers like AV1, AT1. For custom max grade: AV1[15]. To select N highest: @M[N](AV1;AV2;...)/N
courses.formula_help_intro: The formula defines how the final grade for each projection is calculated from the entered assessment grades.
courses.formula_help_identifiers_body: Use any names to represent each assessment. The same names must be used when entering grades in projections.
courses.formula_help_ops_body: Use +, -, * and / freely. For weighted averages, multiply each grade by its weight before adding.
courses.formula_help_maxgrade_body: Add [N] after the identifier to indicate that the maximum grade for that assessment is not 10. The system normalizes the value automatically.
courses.formula_help_topn_body: Use @M[N](id1;id2;...) to sum the N highest grades in the list. Useful when there are optional assessments, substitutions or retakes.
courses.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete the course "{{name}}"? All projections will be removed.
